name: CET-6 精选 100
description: 首批 100 张增强学习卡，含语境填空、中文翻译、用法、搭配、词族与扩展例句。

cards.sentenceEn: The company introduced stricter environmental standards for all new projects.
cards.sentenceZh: 公司为所有新项目引入了更严格的环保标准。
cards.usageNotes: 常作定语修饰 policy、impact、protection 等名词，强调与自然环境有关。

relatedExpressions.note: 更强调生态系统及其相互关系

extraExamples.en: The report examines the environmental impact of urban expansion.
extraExamples.zh: 该报告研究城市扩张对环境的影响。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Each participant was asked to complete a short questionnaire after the experiment.
cards.sentenceZh: 实验结束后，每位参与者都被要求填写一份简短问卷。
cards.clozeSuffix: was asked to complete a short questionnaire after the experiment.
cards.usageNotes: 常用于研究、会议和活动语境，通常与 in 搭配表示参加某项活动。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调出席会议或活动的人
强调回答调查问卷的人

extraExamples.en: More than two hundred participants joined the online workshop.
extraExamples.zh: 两百多名参与者参加了线上研讨会。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The meaning of the phrase becomes clear when it is read in context.
cards.sentenceZh: 把这个短语放在上下文中阅读时，它的含义就清楚了。
cards.clozePrefix: The meaning of the phrase becomes clear when it is read in
cards.usageNotes: 常见结构为 in context、in the context of；学习词汇时应结合上下文理解词义。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调故事或事件发生的环境

wordFamily: contextualize v. 置于背景中理解

extraExamples.en: The decision must be understood within its social context.
extraExamples.zh: 必须在其社会背景下理解这项决定。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: These products fall into a separate category because they require special handling.
cards.sentenceZh: 这些产品属于单独一类，因为它们需要特殊处理。
cards.clozePrefix: These products fall into a separate
cards.usageNotes: 常与 fall into、belong to、divide into 搭配，表示分类。

relatedExpressions.note: 日常用语中更宽泛的“类型”
强调分类体系或分类过程

extraExamples.en: The survey divides responses into three main categories.
extraExamples.zh: 该调查把回答分为三个主要类别。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A careful assessment of the risks is required before construction begins.
cards.sentenceZh: 施工开始前需要对风险进行仔细评估。
cards.clozeSuffix: of the risks is required before construction begins.
cards.usageNotes: 常指系统、正式的评价过程，可搭配 risk、performance、impact。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调依据标准判断价值或效果
常用于工作表现、资产价值等正式评估

extraExamples.en: The teacher used several methods to assess student progress.
extraExamples.zh: 老师采用了多种方法评估学生的进步。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The firm revised its corporate strategy to focus on renewable energy.
cards.sentenceZh: 这家公司调整了企业战略，把重点放在可再生能源上。
cards.clozeSuffix: strategy to focus on renewable energy.
cards.usageNotes: 通常作定语，修饰 strategy、culture、responsibility、governance 等商业名词。

relatedExpressions.note: 更普通，可作名词或定语

extraExamples.en: The company is trying to improve its corporate image.
extraExamples.zh: 该公司正努力改善其企业形象。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The analyst warned that the recent growth might not be sustainable.
cards.sentenceZh: 分析师警告说，近期的增长可能无法持续。
cards.clozeSuffix: warned that the recent growth might not be sustainable.
cards.usageNotes: 常见于金融、政策、数据和市场分析语境。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调向客户提供专业建议的人

extraExamples.en: Several analysts expect interest rates to remain unchanged.
extraExamples.zh: 几位分析师预计利率将保持不变。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The city is known for its rich ethnic diversity and cultural traditions.
cards.sentenceZh: 这座城市以丰富的族群多样性和文化传统而闻名。
cards.clozePrefix: The city is known for its rich
cards.usageNotes: 常修饰 group、minority、community、diversity，描述族群身份或文化。

relatedExpressions.note: 范围更广，涉及文化特征

extraExamples.en: The region is home to several ethnic communities.
extraExamples.zh: 该地区居住着多个族群社区。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Digital technology has transformed the competitive landscape of the industry.
cards.sentenceZh: 数字技术改变了该行业的竞争格局。
cards.clozePrefix: Digital technology has transformed the competitive
cards.usageNotes: 既可指自然景观，也可比喻某一领域的整体形势或格局。

relatedExpressions.note: 主要指可观赏的自然风景

extraExamples.en: The mountain landscape attracts visitors throughout the year.
extraExamples.zh: 山地景观全年吸引游客。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Public perception of the policy changed after more evidence was released.
cards.sentenceZh: 更多证据公布后，公众对这项政策的看法发生了变化。
cards.clozeSuffix: of the policy changed after more evidence was released.
cards.usageNotes: 常与 public、consumer、visual 等搭配，表示人们形成的印象或感知。

extraExamples.en: Our perception of risk is influenced by past experience.
extraExamples.zh: 我们对风险的认知会受到过去经历的影响。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Early intervention can prevent a minor problem from becoming more serious.
cards.sentenceZh: 及早干预可以防止小问题变得更加严重。
cards.clozeSuffix: can prevent a minor problem from becoming more serious.
cards.usageNotes: 常用于医疗、教育、政策和冲突语境，强调主动介入以改变结果。

relatedExpressions.note: 常含不受欢迎的干涉意味

extraExamples.en: The program provides targeted intervention for struggling students.
extraExamples.zh: 该项目为学习困难的学生提供有针对性的干预。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The new fund was created specifically to support small rural businesses.
cards.sentenceZh: 设立这项新基金是专门为了支持农村小企业。
cards.usageNotes: 可用于强调精确对象或目的，常见 specifically designed for、specifically aimed at。

relatedExpressions.note: 尤其，强调程度或重要性

extraExamples.en: The report deals specifically with air pollution in large cities.
extraExamples.zh: 这份报告专门讨论大城市的空气污染。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The renewable energy sector has created thousands of new jobs.
cards.sentenceZh: 可再生能源行业创造了数千个新工作岗位。
cards.clozeSuffix: has created thousands of new jobs.
cards.usageNotes: 常修饰经济中的某一行业或公共服务部门。

relatedExpressions.note: 更宽泛的活动或研究领域

extraExamples.en: Investment in the technology sector continued to rise.
extraExamples.zh: 科技行业的投资持续增长。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The school revised its curriculum to include more practical science lessons.
cards.sentenceZh: 学校修订了课程设置，加入更多实践科学课。
cards.clozeSuffix: to include more practical science lessons.
cards.usageNotes: 指学校或项目中完整的课程体系；复数可用 curricula 或 curriculums。

relatedExpressions.note: 通常指一门具体课程的教学大纲

extraExamples.en: Digital literacy is now part of the national curriculum.
extraExamples.zh: 数字素养如今已成为国家课程的一部分。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 资产；有价值的人或事物
cards.sentenceEn: Her ability to explain complex ideas is a valuable asset to the research team.
cards.sentenceZh: 她解释复杂概念的能力是研究团队的一项宝贵优势。
cards.clozePrefix: Her ability to explain complex ideas is a valuable
cards.definitionZh: 资产；有价值的人或事物
cards.usageNotes: 既可指财务资产，也可指能带来价值的能力、资源或人员。

extraExamples.en: Strong communication skills are an asset in almost any job.
extraExamples.zh: 良好的沟通能力在几乎任何工作中都是一种优势。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The transition from university to full-time employment can be challenging.
cards.sentenceZh: 从大学生活过渡到全职工作可能具有挑战性。
cards.clozeSuffix: from university to full-time employment can be challenging.
cards.usageNotes: 常用结构 transition from A to B，强调状态或阶段的逐步改变。

relatedExpressions.note: 通常指更深刻、彻底的转变

extraExamples.en: The country is making a gradual transition to cleaner energy.
extraExamples.zh: 该国正逐步向更清洁的能源过渡。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Persistent tiredness may be a symptom of an underlying health problem.
cards.sentenceZh: 持续疲劳可能是某种潜在健康问题的症状。
cards.usageNotes: 医学中指疾病表现；也可比喻某个更深层问题的外在征兆。

relatedExpressions.note: 更宽泛的迹象，也可为客观体征
表示某事可能存在的迹象

extraExamples.en: A sudden loss of smell can be an early symptom.
extraExamples.zh: 嗅觉突然丧失可能是一种早期症状。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: After weeks of negotiation, the two sides finally reached an agreement.
cards.sentenceZh: 经过数周谈判，双方终于达成协议。
cards.clozeSuffix: , the two sides finally reached an agreement.
cards.usageNotes: 常用复数 negotiations 指一系列正式谈判；搭配 enter into、conduct、resume。

extraExamples.en: Salary negotiation requires preparation and clear priorities.
extraExamples.zh: 薪资谈判需要准备和明确的优先事项。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The final evaluation showed that the training program had improved productivity.
cards.sentenceZh: 最终评估显示，该培训项目提高了生产率。
cards.clozeSuffix: showed that the training program had improved productivity.
cards.usageNotes: 强调依据证据或标准判断效果、价值或质量。

relatedExpressions.note: 可指测量或判断过程，教育和风险语境常见
可较非正式地回顾检查

extraExamples.en: The committee will evaluate each proposal independently.
extraExamples.zh: 委员会将独立评估每一份提案。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The government introduced spending cuts to reduce the budget deficit.
cards.sentenceZh: 政府实施削减开支措施，以减少预算赤字。
cards.clozePrefix: The government introduced spending cuts to reduce the budget
cards.usageNotes: 常见于财政、贸易和能力不足语境，如 budget deficit、attention deficit。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调实际数量低于所需数量
指欠款总额，不等同于年度赤字

extraExamples.en: The region faces a serious water deficit during the dry season.
extraExamples.zh: 该地区在旱季面临严重缺水。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The organization must confront the causes of inequality rather than ignore them.
cards.sentenceZh: 该组织必须正视不平等的根源，而不是忽视它们。
cards.clozeSuffix: the causes of inequality rather than ignore them.
cards.usageNotes: 可表示勇敢面对问题，也可表示与某人对峙；常接 problem、challenge、reality。

extraExamples.en: Many cities are confronting a shortage of affordable housing.
extraExamples.zh: 许多城市正面临经济适用住房短缺问题。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Young people are often strongly influenced by their peers.
cards.sentenceZh: 年轻人经常受到同龄人的强烈影响。
cards.clozePrefix: Young people are often strongly influenced by their
cards.usageNotes: 常见 peer pressure、peer review、peer group；作动词时也可表示凝视。

extraExamples.en: The article was checked through a formal peer-review process.
extraExamples.zh: 这篇文章经过了正式的同行评审过程。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The debate focused on how immigration affects the labor market.
cards.sentenceZh: 这场辩论集中讨论移民入境如何影响劳动力市场。
cards.usageNotes: 指进入另一个国家定居；与 emigration“移出本国”相对。

extraExamples.en: Changes in immigration law affected thousands of families.
extraExamples.zh: 移民法的变化影响了数千个家庭。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The phrase should not be interpreted literally in this context.
cards.sentenceZh: 在这个语境中，不应按字面理解这个短语。
cards.clozePrefix: The phrase should not be interpreted
cards.usageNotes: 正式表达中表示“按字面”；口语中也常作强调语，但应避免过度使用。

relatedExpressions.note: 比喻地，与 literally 相对

extraExamples.en: The temperature literally fell below zero overnight.
extraExamples.zh: 气温一夜之间确实降到了零度以下。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The company hired an independent consultant to review its safety procedures.
cards.sentenceZh: 公司聘请了一名独立顾问审查其安全程序。
cards.usageNotes: 通常指为机构或个人提供专业建议的人。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调某一领域的专门知识

extraExamples.en: A financial consultant helped them prepare a long-term plan.
extraExamples.zh: 一位财务顾问帮助他们制定了长期计划。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The policy is intended to encourage small enterprise in rural areas.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项政策旨在鼓励农村地区发展小企业。
cards.clozePrefix: The policy is intended to encourage small
cards.usageNotes: 可指企业组织，也可指需要投入和主动性的事业。

relatedExpressions.note: 常指带风险的新项目或企业

extraExamples.en: The project is a joint enterprise between two universities.
extraExamples.zh: 该项目是两所大学的合作事业。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The union will negotiate with management over pay and working conditions.
cards.sentenceZh: 工会将就薪资和工作条件与管理层谈判。
cards.clozeSuffix: with management over pay and working conditions.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 negotiate with someone over/about something；也可接 contract、deal。

extraExamples.en: They negotiated a lower price with the supplier.
extraExamples.zh: 他们与供应商谈成了更低的价格。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: All applications will be judged according to the same criteria.
cards.sentenceZh: 所有申请都将按照相同的标准进行评判。
cards.clozePrefix: All applications will be judged according to the same
cards.usageNotes: criteria 是复数，单数为 criterion；常与 meet、selection、evaluation 搭配。

extraExamples.en: Cost is only one criterion for choosing a supplier.
extraExamples.zh: 成本只是选择供应商的一项标准。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The treatment is still being tested in a large clinical trial.
cards.sentenceZh: 这种治疗方法仍在一项大型临床试验中接受测试。
cards.clozePrefix: The treatment is still being tested in a large
cards.usageNotes: 医学语境常修饰 trial、evidence、practice、symptom。

relatedExpressions.note: 更宽泛地指医学或医疗

extraExamples.en: Doctors need more clinical evidence before recommending the drug.
extraExamples.zh: 医生在推荐这种药物之前需要更多临床证据。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The country agreed to provide temporary shelter for thousands of refugees.
cards.sentenceZh: 该国同意为数千名难民提供临时住所。
cards.clozePrefix: The country agreed to provide temporary shelter for thousands of
cards.usageNotes: 指因战争、迫害或灾难被迫离开本国的人；注意与一般 migrant 区分。

relatedExpressions.note: 正在申请庇护、身份尚未确定的人

extraExamples.en: Many refugees were separated from their families during the conflict.
extraExamples.zh: 许多难民在冲突期间与家人失散。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The revised plan incorporates feedback from local residents.
cards.sentenceZh: 修订后的方案纳入了当地居民的反馈。
cards.usageNotes: 常用 incorporate A into B，表示把某要素纳入整体。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调使不同部分协调成为整体

wordFamily: incorporation n. 纳入；公司注册

extraExamples.en: The course incorporates both theory and practical training.
extraExamples.zh: 这门课程同时包含理论和实践训练。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Researchers are trying to identify the mechanism behind the disease.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员正试图找出这种疾病背后的机制。
cards.clozePrefix: Researchers are trying to identify the
cards.usageNotes: 既可指机器部件，也常指产生某种结果的过程或制度。

extraExamples.en: The body has a natural mechanism for regulating temperature.
extraExamples.zh: 人体具有调节体温的自然机制。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Companies that break the rule may face a heavy financial penalty.
cards.sentenceZh: 违反规定的公司可能面临高额经济处罚。
cards.clozePrefix: Companies that break the rule may face a heavy financial
cards.usageNotes: 常与 impose、pay、face 搭配；体育中也可指罚球。

extraExamples.en: Late payment may result in an additional penalty.
extraExamples.zh: 逾期付款可能导致额外罚金。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Tax reductions give businesses an incentive to invest in clean technology.
cards.sentenceZh: 减税为企业投资清洁技术提供了激励。
cards.usageNotes: 常用 give/provide an incentive to do something；可指金钱或非金钱激励。

relatedExpressions.note: 完成行为后给予的回报

extraExamples.en: The bonus scheme creates an incentive for employees to improve performance.
extraExamples.zh: 奖金制度激励员工提高绩效。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The factory was fined for a serious violation of environmental regulations.
cards.sentenceZh: 这家工厂因严重违反环保法规而被罚款。
cards.clozePrefix: The factory was fined for a serious
cards.usageNotes: 常用 violation of law/rules/rights；指违反规定或侵犯权利。

relatedExpressions.note: 常指违反合同、义务或安全规定

extraExamples.en: Sharing the data without permission would be a privacy violation.
extraExamples.zh: 未经允许共享这些数据将构成隐私侵犯。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The proposal caused considerable controversy among local residents.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项提议在当地居民中引起了相当大的争议。
cards.usageNotes: 通常指持续、公开且意见对立的争论；常与 spark、cause、surround 搭配。

relatedExpressions.note: 可为有组织、理性的讨论

extraExamples.en: The decision remains a subject of intense controversy.
extraExamples.zh: 这项决定仍是激烈争议的焦点。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Women constitute nearly half of the organization's senior staff.
cards.sentenceZh: 女性构成该组织高级员工的近一半。
cards.clozeSuffix: nearly half of the organization's senior staff.
cards.usageNotes: 表示“构成某整体”时主语为组成部分；也可表示“构成某种行为或情况”。

relatedExpressions.note: 整体由若干部分组成时常用

extraExamples.en: Such behavior may constitute a breach of contract.
extraExamples.zh: 这种行为可能构成违约。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The new engine produces significantly lower carbon emissions.
cards.sentenceZh: 这种新发动机产生的碳排放显著更低。
cards.clozePrefix: The new engine produces significantly lower carbon
cards.usageNotes: 环境语境中常用复数 emissions，搭配 carbon、gas、reduce。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调释放液体、气体或废物
污染现象或污染物总称

extraExamples.en: Several countries have promised to cut greenhouse-gas emissions.
extraExamples.zh: 多个国家承诺削减温室气体排放。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Older people are particularly vulnerable to extreme heat.
cards.sentenceZh: 老年人特别容易受到极端高温的伤害。
cards.usageNotes: 常用 vulnerable to，说明容易受某种风险、攻击或影响。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调容易受疾病或影响
强调容易破碎或失去稳定

extraExamples.en: Small coastal communities are vulnerable to rising sea levels.
extraExamples.zh: 小型沿海社区容易受到海平面上升的影响。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The new system has the capability to process large amounts of data in real time.
cards.sentenceZh: 新系统具备实时处理大量数据的能力。
cards.clozeSuffix: to process large amounts of data in real time.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 capability to do 或 capability for doing；也可表示设备性能。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调可容纳量或潜在能力

extraExamples.en: The laboratory lacks the capability to conduct this type of test.
extraExamples.zh: 该实验室不具备开展这类测试的能力。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The course introduces students to the basic principles of human psychology.
cards.sentenceZh: 这门课程向学生介绍人类心理学的基本原理。
cards.clozePrefix: The course introduces students to the basic principles of human
cards.usageNotes: 既指学科，也可指个人或群体的心理过程和思维方式。

relatedExpressions.note: 个人较稳定的思维模式

extraExamples.en: Consumer psychology plays an important role in advertising.
extraExamples.zh: 消费者心理在广告中起着重要作用。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The application collects personal data, raising concerns about user privacy.
cards.sentenceZh: 该应用收集个人数据，引发了对用户隐私的担忧。
cards.clozePrefix: The application collects personal data, raising concerns about user
cards.usageNotes: 不可数名词，常见 protect privacy、privacy concerns、right to privacy。

extraExamples.en: Employees have a right to privacy in certain circumstances.
extraExamples.zh: 在某些情况下，员工享有隐私权。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: She spoke with conviction about the need for equal access to education.
cards.sentenceZh: 她坚定地谈到平等获得教育的必要性。
cards.clozeSuffix: about the need for equal access to education.
cards.usageNotes: 可表示强烈信念，也可指法院定罪；需根据语境区分。

extraExamples.en: The evidence led to his conviction for fraud.
extraExamples.zh: 这些证据导致他因欺诈被定罪。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The government postponed the controversial reform after widespread protests.
cards.sentenceZh: 在广泛抗议之后，政府推迟了这项有争议的改革。
cards.usageNotes: 修饰引发强烈分歧的议题、决定、人物或观点。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调真实性或合法性受到质疑

extraExamples.en: The article makes a controversial claim about social media.
extraExamples.zh: 这篇文章对社交媒体提出了一个有争议的主张。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The documentary challenges the traditional narrative of economic progress.
cards.sentenceZh: 这部纪录片质疑了关于经济进步的传统叙事。
cards.usageNotes: 既指故事叙述，也可指社会中被广泛传播的一套解释框架。

extraExamples.en: Different groups offered competing narratives of the event.
extraExamples.zh: 不同群体对该事件提出了相互竞争的叙事。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The report asserts that the current policy has failed to reduce inequality.
cards.sentenceZh: 报告断言，现行政策未能减少不平等。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the current policy has failed to reduce inequality.
cards.usageNotes: 常接 that 从句；assert oneself 表示坚定表达自己或维护权利。

relatedExpressions.note: 可表示声称，但未必有证据

extraExamples.en: The company continues to assert its independence.
extraExamples.zh: 该公司继续坚持其独立性。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Online platforms have become a dominant source of news for many young adults.
cards.sentenceZh: 网络平台已成为许多年轻人的主要新闻来源。
cards.clozeSuffix: source of news for many young adults.
cards.usageNotes: 可描述力量、地位、特征或基因占优势。

extraExamples.en: One firm holds a dominant position in the local market.
extraExamples.zh: 一家公司在当地市场占据主导地位。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The museum works to preserve the region's cultural heritage.
cards.sentenceZh: 该博物馆致力于保护该地区的文化遗产。
cards.clozePrefix: The museum works to preserve the region's cultural
cards.usageNotes: 常指从过去继承的文化、历史、自然或家族传统。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调前人留下、持续产生影响的事物
代代传承的习俗或做法

wordFamily: heritage conservation n. 遗产保护

extraExamples.en: Traditional crafts are an important part of the nation's heritage.
extraExamples.zh: 传统手工艺是该国遗产的重要组成部分。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The scientist's greatest legacy is the network of young researchers she trained.
cards.sentenceZh: 这位科学家最大的遗产是她培养的青年研究人员网络。
cards.clozeSuffix: is the network of young researchers she trained.
cards.usageNotes: 既可指遗赠财产，也常指一个人、制度或事件留下的长期影响。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调继承的文化或传统

extraExamples.en: The conflict left a painful legacy for later generations.
extraExamples.zh: 这场冲突给后代留下了痛苦的影响。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Residents have legitimate concerns about the safety of the proposed facility.
cards.sentenceZh: 居民对拟建设施的安全性有合理的担忧。
cards.clozeSuffix: concerns about the safety of the proposed facility.
cards.usageNotes: 既表示法律上合法，也表示理由、要求或关切合理正当。

extraExamples.en: The court must decide whether the claim is legitimate.
extraExamples.zh: 法院必须判断这项诉求是否正当。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: New employees attend an orientation program during their first week.
cards.sentenceZh: 新员工在第一周参加入职培训项目。
cards.usageNotes: 可表示方向、价值取向，也常指帮助新人熟悉环境的培训。

relatedExpressions.note: 英式英语中常指入职介绍和培训

wordFamily: orient v. 使适应；确定方向

extraExamples.en: The course provides an orientation to basic research methods.
extraExamples.zh: 这门课程对基本研究方法作入门介绍。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: High inflation has reduced the purchasing power of many households.
cards.sentenceZh: 高通胀降低了许多家庭的购买力。
cards.clozeSuffix: has reduced the purchasing power of many households.
cards.usageNotes: 经济语境中为不可数名词，常与 rate、control、rising 搭配。

relatedExpressions.note: 通货紧缩，与 inflation 相反

extraExamples.en: The central bank raised interest rates to curb inflation.
extraExamples.zh: 中央银行提高利率以遏制通货膨胀。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A cluster of technology companies has developed around the university.
cards.sentenceZh: 大学周边形成了一个科技企业集群。
cards.clozeSuffix: of technology companies has developed around the university.
cards.usageNotes: 可指相互靠近的一组事物；作动词表示聚集在一起。

extraExamples.en: The cases were concentrated in a small geographic cluster.
extraExamples.zh: 这些病例集中在一个很小的地理区域内。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The painting depicts daily life in the city during the nineteenth century.
cards.sentenceZh: 这幅画描绘了十九世纪这座城市的日常生活。
cards.clozeSuffix: daily life in the city during the nineteenth century.
cards.usageNotes: 可用于图画、电影、文字对人物或情景的呈现。

relatedExpressions.note: 常强调对人物或形象的刻画

extraExamples.en: The chart depicts how energy use changed over time.
extraExamples.zh: 该图表展示了能源使用随时间的变化。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The instructor demonstrated the procedure before allowing students to try it.
cards.sentenceZh: 指导教师在让学生尝试之前演示了操作流程。
cards.clozeSuffix: demonstrated the procedure before allowing students to try it.
cards.usageNotes: 常指教授某项技能或课程的人，尤其在大学、培训或运动中。

extraExamples.en: Ask the instructor for help if the equipment does not work.
extraExamples.zh: 如果设备无法工作，请向指导教师求助。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: They took out a mortgage to buy their first apartment.
cards.sentenceZh: 他们办理了抵押贷款，购买第一套公寓。
cards.usageNotes: 常见 take out/pay off a mortgage；也可作动词表示以房产抵押。

relatedExpressions.note: 租金，不产生房屋所有权

extraExamples.en: Rising interest rates have increased monthly mortgage payments.
extraExamples.zh: 利率上升增加了每月按揭还款额。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The international sanctions restricted the country's access to financial markets.
cards.sentenceZh: 国际制裁限制了该国进入金融市场的渠道。
cards.clozeSuffix: restricted the country's access to financial markets.
cards.usageNotes: 作名词可表示惩罚性制裁，也可表示正式批准；语境决定含义。

extraExamples.en: The organization threatened to impose further sanctions.
extraExamples.zh: 该组织威胁要实施进一步制裁。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The course examines the ethics of using artificial intelligence in healthcare.
cards.sentenceZh: 这门课程探讨在医疗中使用人工智能的伦理问题。
cards.clozeSuffix: of using artificial intelligence in healthcare.
cards.usageNotes: 通常作复数形式但可视为一门学科；常见 professional、research、business ethics。

extraExamples.en: All researchers must follow strict rules of professional ethics.
extraExamples.zh: 所有研究人员都必须遵守严格的职业伦理规范。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The study analyzes how gender is represented in public discourse.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项研究分析性别在公共话语中是如何被呈现的。
cards.clozePrefix: The study analyzes how gender is represented in public
cards.usageNotes: 正式学术词，可指语言表达体系、公共讨论或较长的论述。

extraExamples.en: Social media has changed the tone of political discourse.
extraExamples.zh: 社交媒体改变了政治话语的语调。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The company lowered its prices after a major competitor entered the market.
cards.sentenceZh: 一家主要竞争对手进入市场后，该公司降低了价格。
cards.clozePrefix: The company lowered its prices after a major
cards.usageNotes: 可指商业对手，也可指比赛参赛者。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调长期或强烈竞争关系
比赛、争论或选举中的对手

extraExamples.en: Small firms often struggle to compete with larger competitors.
extraExamples.zh: 小企业常常难以与更大的竞争对手竞争。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The film portrays the main character as both ambitious and deeply insecure.
cards.sentenceZh: 这部电影把主人公刻画成既有抱负又极度缺乏安全感的人。
cards.clozeSuffix: the main character as both ambitious and deeply insecure.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 portray someone as，描述媒体或艺术作品如何呈现人物或事件。

relatedExpressions.note: 可用于图像或文字客观呈现
范围更广，可表示代表或象征

extraExamples.en: The news report portrayed the protest as largely peaceful.
extraExamples.zh: 新闻报道把这场抗议描述为总体和平。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The actor read the script several times before the first rehearsal.
cards.sentenceZh: 这位演员在第一次排练前把剧本读了好几遍。
cards.clozeSuffix: several times before the first rehearsal.
cards.usageNotes: 可指影视剧本、演讲稿，也可指计算机脚本。

extraExamples.en: A short script automates the most repetitive part of the task.
extraExamples.zh: 一个简短脚本自动完成了任务中最重复的部分。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The evidence is limited; nonetheless, the findings deserve careful attention.
cards.sentenceZh: 证据有限；尽管如此，这些发现仍值得认真关注。
cards.usageNotes: 正式连接副词，表示前后转折；常置于句首或分号之后。

relatedExpressions.note: 最常用的转折连接副词

wordFamily: none the less phr. 仍然

extraExamples.en: The journey was difficult, but it was nonetheless rewarding.
extraExamples.zh: 旅程很艰难，但仍然很有收获。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The medicine is available only with a doctor's prescription.
cards.sentenceZh: 这种药只有凭医生处方才能获得。
cards.clozePrefix: The medicine is available only with a doctor's
cards.usageNotes: 医疗中指处方；正式语境也可指解决问题的方案或指示。

relatedExpressions.note: 烹饪配方，也可比喻方法
建议，不具有处方的正式性

extraExamples.en: The doctor changed the prescription after reviewing the test results.
extraExamples.zh: 医生查看检测结果后更改了处方。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The committee reached a consensus after several hours of discussion.
cards.sentenceZh: 委员会经过数小时讨论后达成了共识。
cards.usageNotes: 不可数名词，常用 reach/build/achieve a consensus；通常不说 a general consensus 之外的普通复数。

extraExamples.en: There is growing consensus that the system needs reform.
extraExamples.zh: 越来越多的人形成共识，认为该制度需要改革。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The museum contains documents from the country's colonial period.
cards.sentenceZh: 博物馆收藏了该国殖民时期的文件。
cards.clozePrefix: The museum contains documents from the country's
cards.usageNotes: 常修饰 rule、history、period、power，涉及殖民统治或历史。

extraExamples.en: Many present-day borders were drawn during the colonial era.
extraExamples.zh: 许多今天的边界是在殖民时代划定的。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Regular sleep is essential for memory and other cognitive functions.
cards.sentenceZh: 规律睡眠对记忆及其他认知功能至关重要。
cards.clozePrefix: Regular sleep is essential for memory and other
cards.usageNotes: 心理学和教育中常修饰 ability、process、development、function。

relatedExpressions.note: 更宽泛的心理或精神方面

extraExamples.en: The task places a heavy cognitive demand on young children.
extraExamples.zh: 这项任务对幼儿提出了很高的认知要求。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The defendant denied all the charges during the trial.
cards.sentenceZh: 被告在审判中否认了所有指控。
cards.clozeSuffix: denied all the charges during the trial.
cards.usageNotes: 法律术语，指刑事或民事案件中被起诉的一方。

relatedExpressions.note: 被指控者，身份表达较一般

extraExamples.en: The court allowed the defendant to present new evidence.
extraExamples.zh: 法院允许被告提交新证据。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Regular exercise can improve physical fitness and reduce stress.
cards.sentenceZh: 规律锻炼可以改善身体素质并减轻压力。
cards.usageNotes: 可指身体健康，也可表示某人或某物对特定目的的适合程度。
wordFamily: fit adj. 健康的；适合的

extraExamples.en: The test measures the candidates' fitness for demanding work.
extraExamples.zh: 该测试衡量候选人是否适合高强度工作。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The two organizations formed an alliance to promote digital education.
cards.sentenceZh: 这两个组织结成联盟，以推动数字教育。
cards.usageNotes: 常见 form/enter an alliance；可指国家、政党或机构间合作。

relatedExpressions.note: 为特定政治目标组成的联盟

extraExamples.en: The parties entered an electoral alliance before the election.
extraExamples.zh: 这些政党在选举前组成了选举联盟。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The experiment was designed to test the hypothesis that sleep improves memory.
cards.sentenceZh: 该实验旨在检验“睡眠能改善记忆”这一假设。
cards.clozePrefix: The experiment was designed to test the
cards.usageNotes: 学术研究中指可通过证据检验的解释或预测；复数 hypotheses。

relatedExpressions.note: 经过较广泛证据支持的解释体系

extraExamples.en: The data did not provide enough evidence to reject the hypothesis.
extraExamples.zh: 数据没有提供足够证据来否定该假设。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The program provides mental-health support for adolescents and their families.
cards.sentenceZh: 该项目为青少年及其家庭提供心理健康支持。
cards.clozePrefix: The program provides mental-health support for
cards.usageNotes: 通常指青春期到成年早期的人；也可作形容词。

relatedExpressions.note: 日常用语，通常指十三至十九岁的人
可指青年群体，范围更宽

extraExamples.en: Adolescents often become more sensitive to peer opinion.
extraExamples.zh: 青少年往往会变得更在意同龄人的看法。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Working from home has become the norm in some industries.
cards.sentenceZh: 在一些行业，居家办公已成为常态。
cards.clozePrefix: Working from home has become the
cards.usageNotes: 常用 the norm 表示通常情况；social norms 表示社会行为规范。

extraExamples.en: The study explores how social norms influence consumer behavior.
extraExamples.zh: 该研究探讨社会规范如何影响消费者行为。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 细微的；微妙的；不易察觉的
cards.sentenceEn: There is a subtle difference between the two expressions.
cards.sentenceZh: 这两个表达之间存在细微差别。
cards.definitionZh: 细微的；微妙的；不易察觉的
cards.usageNotes: 可描述难以察觉的变化、含义、影响或技巧；注意发音中 b 不发音。

relatedExpressions.note: 程度很小，但不一定难以察觉
精细、脆弱或需谨慎处理

extraExamples.en: The advertisement uses subtle emotional cues.
extraExamples.zh: 这则广告使用了细微的情感暗示。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Researchers must protect the integrity of the data they collect.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员必须保护所收集数据的完整性。
cards.usageNotes: 可指诚实正直，也可指系统、结构或数据保持完整可靠。

extraExamples.en: She is widely respected for her professional integrity.
extraExamples.zh: 她因职业操守而广受尊敬。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The essence of the proposal is to give local communities more control.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项提案的核心是给予当地社区更多控制权。
cards.clozeSuffix: of the proposal is to give local communities more control.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 the essence of、in essence，表示最重要的本质或概括。
wordFamily: essential adj. 必要的；本质的

extraExamples.en: The photograph captures the essence of life in the old town.
extraExamples.zh: 这张照片捕捉到了老城生活的精髓。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Youth unemployment remains a serious problem in many regions.
cards.sentenceZh: 青年失业在许多地区仍是一个严重问题。
cards.clozeSuffix: remains a serious problem in many regions.
cards.usageNotes: 不可数名词；常搭配 rate、benefit、rise、reduce。

relatedExpressions.note: 失业状态，较少用于正式指标

extraExamples.en: The policy aims to reduce long-term unemployment.
extraExamples.zh: 这项政策旨在减少长期失业。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Climate change presents a long-term challenge to humanity.
cards.sentenceZh: 气候变化给全人类带来了长期挑战。
cards.clozePrefix: Climate change presents a long-term challenge to
cards.usageNotes: 可表示人类整体，也可指同情、仁慈等人性品质。

extraExamples.en: The discovery could bring great benefits to humanity.
extraExamples.zh: 这项发现可能给人类带来巨大益处。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The study found a strong correlation between sleep quality and academic performance.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究发现睡眠质量与学习表现之间存在很强的相关性。
cards.clozeSuffix: between sleep quality and academic performance.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 correlation between A and B；相关不等于因果。

relatedExpressions.note: 因果关系，不应与 correlation 混淆

extraExamples.en: A correlation does not necessarily prove that one factor causes the other.
extraExamples.zh: 相关性并不一定证明一个因素导致另一个因素。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The company launched an investigation into allegations of financial misconduct.
cards.sentenceZh: 该公司对财务不当行为的指控展开调查。
cards.clozePrefix: The company launched an investigation into
cards.usageNotes: 强调尚未被证实的指控，常用 allegation of/that。

extraExamples.en: The minister strongly denied the allegation.
extraExamples.zh: 部长坚决否认了这项指控。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The university initiated a review of its admissions policy.
cards.sentenceZh: 大学启动了对招生政策的审查。
cards.clozeSuffix: a review of its admissions policy.
cards.usageNotes: 正式词，常接 process、investigation、discussion、program。

relatedExpressions.note: 常用于正式推出项目、产品或活动

extraExamples.en: The two sides initiated talks to resolve the dispute.
extraExamples.zh: 双方开始谈判以解决争端。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 恳求；作出有罪或无罪答辩
cards.sentenceEn: The defendant pleaded not guilty to all charges.
cards.sentenceZh: 被告对所有指控作了无罪答辩。
cards.definitionZh: 恳求；作出有罪或无罪答辩
cards.usageNotes: 法律中常用 plead guilty/not guilty；一般语境中 plead with someone to do。

extraExamples.en: She pleaded with the council to reconsider its decision.
extraExamples.zh: 她恳求委员会重新考虑决定。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The city introduced new measures to combat air pollution.
cards.sentenceZh: 该市推出了新措施来治理空气污染。
cards.clozePrefix: The city introduced new measures to
cards.usageNotes: 正式动词，常接 disease、crime、poverty、pollution；也可作名词表示战斗。

relatedExpressions.note: 更普通，可用于具体或抽象斗争

extraExamples.en: Education can play a major role in combating poverty.
extraExamples.zh: 教育可以在消除贫困方面发挥重要作用。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A large metal sculpture stands at the entrance to the museum.
cards.sentenceZh: 博物馆入口处矗立着一座大型金属雕塑。
cards.clozeSuffix: stands at the entrance to the museum.
cards.usageNotes: 既可数指一件雕塑，也可不可数指雕塑艺术。

relatedExpressions.note: 通常指人物或动物塑像

extraExamples.en: The artist created the sculpture from recycled materials.
extraExamples.zh: 艺术家用回收材料创作了这件雕塑。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Researchers must consider the ethical consequences of collecting personal data.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员必须考虑收集个人数据的伦理后果。
cards.usageNotes: 常修饰 issue、standard、principle、concern；也可表示符合道德规范。

relatedExpressions.note: 更广泛涉及个人和社会的是非判断
符合法律，但不一定合乎伦理

extraExamples.en: The company promised to use only ethically sourced materials.
extraExamples.zh: 该公司承诺只使用以合乎伦理方式采购的材料。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Continuous innovation is essential for firms operating in a competitive market.
cards.sentenceZh: 持续创新对于在竞争市场中经营的企业至关重要。
cards.clozeSuffix: is essential for firms operating in a competitive market.
cards.usageNotes: 既可指创新过程，也可指新方法、产品或理念。

extraExamples.en: The award recognizes innovation in sustainable design.
extraExamples.zh: 该奖项表彰可持续设计方面的创新。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Repeated delays have undermined public confidence in the project.
cards.sentenceZh: 一再延期削弱了公众对该项目的信心。
cards.usageNotes: 常接 confidence、authority、stability、effort，表示逐渐削弱基础。

extraExamples.en: False information can undermine trust in public institutions.
extraExamples.zh: 虚假信息会削弱公众对公共机构的信任。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The images had been digitally manipulated to create a misleading impression.
cards.sentenceZh: 这些图像经过数字处理，造成了误导性印象。
cards.usageNotes: 可表示熟练操作物体或数据，也可指不正当地影响他人。
wordFamily: manipulative adj. 善于操纵人的

extraExamples.en: The device allows users to manipulate the model in three dimensions.
extraExamples.zh: 该设备允许用户在三维空间中操作模型。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The council allocated additional funds to improve public transport.
cards.sentenceZh: 市政委员会拨出额外资金改善公共交通。
cards.clozeSuffix: additional funds to improve public transport.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 allocate something to/for，表示按计划分配资源。

extraExamples.en: Managers must allocate limited resources carefully.
extraExamples.zh: 管理者必须谨慎分配有限资源。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 连贯的；一致的；有条理的
cards.sentenceEn: The report presents a coherent argument supported by clear evidence.
cards.sentenceZh: 这份报告提出了一个由清晰证据支持的连贯论点。
cards.definitionZh: 连贯的；一致的；有条理的
cards.usageNotes: 可描述语言、论证、政策或系统内部逻辑一致。

extraExamples.en: The separate proposals need to be combined into a coherent plan.
extraExamples.zh: 这些分散的提议需要整合成一项连贯的计划。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Air quality began to deteriorate as traffic increased during the holiday.
cards.sentenceZh: 假日期间交通量增加，空气质量开始恶化。
cards.clozeSuffix: as traffic increased during the holiday.
cards.usageNotes: 不及物用法常见；也可作及物动词，表示使某物变坏。

extraExamples.en: The patient's condition deteriorated overnight.
extraExamples.zh: 病人的状况一夜之间恶化了。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The new platform facilitates communication between teachers and parents.
cards.sentenceZh: 新平台促进了教师与家长之间的沟通。
cards.usageNotes: 正式词，表示使过程更容易或更顺利；常接 communication、learning、access。

extraExamples.en: Clear guidelines can facilitate effective cooperation.
extraExamples.zh: 清晰的指南可以促进有效合作。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Reliable digital infrastructure is essential for remote education.
cards.sentenceZh: 可靠的数字基础设施对远程教育至关重要。
cards.usageNotes: 不可数名词，指交通、能源、通信等支撑社会运行的系统。

extraExamples.en: The city needs major investment in public infrastructure.
extraExamples.zh: 这座城市需要对公共基础设施进行大规模投资。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The campaign gained momentum after several well-known scientists expressed support.
cards.sentenceZh: 几位知名科学家表示支持后，这项运动获得了势头。
cards.clozeSuffix: after several well-known scientists expressed support.
cards.usageNotes: 比喻用法常见 gain/maintain/lose momentum；物理中指动量。

relatedExpressions.note: 促使某事开始或加速的推动力

extraExamples.en: The economy continued to build momentum in the second quarter.
extraExamples.zh: 经济在第二季度继续积聚增长势头。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The system can handle several simultaneous requests without slowing down.
cards.sentenceZh: 该系统可以同时处理多个请求而不减速。
cards.usageNotes: 强调两件或多件事在同一时间发生。

extraExamples.en: The two teams announced their results in simultaneous press conferences.
extraExamples.zh: 两个团队在同时举行的新闻发布会上公布了结果。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A sudden rise in food prices could trigger widespread public concern.
cards.sentenceZh: 食品价格突然上涨可能引发广泛的公众担忧。
cards.clozePrefix: A sudden rise in food prices could
cards.usageNotes: 常接 reaction、crisis、alarm、response；也可作名词表示诱因或扳机。

relatedExpressions.note: 引起强烈反应，常含负面意味

extraExamples.en: The announcement triggered a sharp fall in share prices.
extraExamples.zh: 这项公告引发股价大幅下跌。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The wording of the contract is ambiguous and may lead to different interpretations.
cards.sentenceZh: 合同措辞含糊，可能导致不同解释。
cards.clozePrefix: The wording of the contract is
cards.clozeSuffix: and may lead to different interpretations.
cards.usageNotes: 描述词语、陈述或情况有两种以上解释，缺乏明确性。

extraExamples.en: The question was deliberately ambiguous.
extraExamples.zh: 这个问题被故意表述得模棱两可。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The museum confirmed that the document was authentic.
cards.sentenceZh: 博物馆确认这份文件是真迹。
cards.clozePrefix: The museum confirmed that the document was
cards.usageNotes: 可指物品真实非伪造，也可指体验、风格或表达真诚可信。

extraExamples.en: Visitors can try authentic regional dishes at the market.
extraExamples.zh: 游客可以在市场品尝正宗的地方菜肴。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The company agreed to compensate residents for the damage caused by the accident.
cards.sentenceZh: 公司同意赔偿居民因事故造成的损失。
cards.clozeSuffix: residents for the damage caused by the accident.
cards.usageNotes: 常用 compensate someone for something；也可指弥补不足。

extraExamples.en: Extra training can compensate for a lack of experience.
extraExamples.zh: 额外培训可以弥补经验不足。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The team has won five consecutive matches this season.
cards.sentenceZh: 这支球队本赛季已经连续赢得五场比赛。
cards.usageNotes: 强调事件一个接一个、没有中断；常修饰 days、years、victories。

relatedExpressions.note: 持续不断，强调过程没有停顿

extraExamples.en: Sales increased for the third consecutive month.
extraExamples.zh: 销售额连续第三个月增长。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创学习内容
